behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the target file src/bun.js/bindings/JSGlobalObject.zig and all four function names (createErrorInstance, createTypeErrorInstance, createSyntaxErrorInstance, createRangeErrorInstance) plus createDOMExceptionInstance that tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and what must happen (clear pending exception, return typed errors) but does not specify the exact method name clearExceptionExceptTermination or code structure.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use flexible regex patterns like r'this\.[a-zA-Z_]*[Cc]lear[a-zA-Z_]*\s*\(' and r'\.to[A-Za-z]*ErrorInstance\(' that accept alternative method names for exception clearing.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests perform structural AST-like analysis by parsing brace depth and function bodies rather than plain text grep; however they do not execute the Zig code. Still goes beyond simple string matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require both an exception-clearing call AND a correct typed return within catch blocks; a stub would not satisfy _has_exception_clear_call_in_scope and _get_error_return_type simultaneously.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all four functions named in the requirements and also verify createDOMExceptionInstance is not modified, matching the three requirements.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests use clear naming like test_create_error_instance_handles_exception_gracefully with [f2p] tags and section-divider comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies Zig source code, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and function names match between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file as part of the specification but doesn't point to exact line numbers or reveal the clearExceptionExceptTermination helper.
